subject: collaboration-entry-ux
implementationClaims: Drive connection and exact-folder selection are reachable from the research workspace without opening Ask.
The global sidebar exposes a permanent Drive destination and a Drive & shared projects action.
Every open local project distinguishes ongoing Drive collaboration from an independent offline archive.
Local project transport changes only after the existing full-state Drive publish succeeds.

visualEvidence.reason: The in-app browser runtime was blocked before launch by the Windows ACL sandbox helper. No fallback browser was substituted.

nonClaims: This does not prove a real Google publish, Join, or two-install convergence.
Export offline copy is not live synchronization.
The LAN MCP control plane does not synchronize project Yjs state.
